summary: Comprehensive testing of Quantum Wealth & BO Platform completed successfully. All backend APIs (20/20) and frontend user flows working perfectly. Phase 3 Recharts dashboard enhancements verified and functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor timing issue with dialog close/refresh sequence

Frontend: News refresh and article display
Frontend: Trade logging and result updates
Frontend: Dashboard Recharts components (PieChart, BarChart, AreaChart)
Backend: RSS news aggregation (40 articles fetched)
Backend: Trade stats with asset/direction/expiry breakdowns
Backend: Safeguard rules creation and toggle functionality
